title: Severity
text: Severity Severity level of the message. Valid values are None (default), Informational , Warning , Error , or Serious error . Description Many message objects are used to define the text of labels and menus, in which case setting the Severity is not desirable. For error and warning messages that are displayed in response to an event or action, it may be desirable to set the Severity . Depending on the platform, the Severity property determines the type of audio signal, or beep, produced when the message is displayed. This value can be overridden by the askmess/nobeep ProcScript statement. Applies To Message Related Links Messages Messages are language-related objects that enable you to deploy a Uniface application in different languages and locales. They are stored in language-specific libraries, and Uniface automatically chooses the appropriate library at runtime based on the configuration. askmess Display a message and wait for the user's response.
